entry.title: IDC NAS598144 (21) awarded to OAO CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: OUTSOURCING DESKTOP INITIATIVE FOR NASA (ODIN) CONTRACT. ODIN IS A PROGRAM TO IMPLEMENT THE OUTSOURCING OF NASA'S DESKTOP COMPUTING ENVIRONMENT.
